claude.setup: Go to mcp.zapier.com > New MCP Server > select Claude > name it > Create
claude.connect: Follow instructions on the Connect tab at mcp.zapier.com
claude.note: Must be Claude organization owner to add MCP servers

chatgpt.setup: Go to mcp.zapier.com > New MCP Server > select ChatGPT > name it > Create
chatgpt.connect: Follow instructions on the Connect tab at mcp.zapier.com
chatgpt.note: Enable Developer Mode in ChatGPT first. Manually refresh Zapier Connector when tools change.
